description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is predominantly orange with several white horizontal stripes spiraling around its surface, which are likely intended to increase visibility. The surface of the cone shows signs of wear, with visible dirt, scuff marks, and some fading, suggesting it has been used outdoors. The base appears to be made of a thicker, heavier material, possibly rubber, to prevent tipping, and it is slightly textured. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with white spiral stripes and a wide, sturdy square base. The surface shows dirt and scuff marks, indicating outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cone's pointed tip, spiral white stripes, and a slightly warped square base with visible dirt.
description_view_1: This side highlights more pronounced scuff marks and dirt on the stripes, with the base appearing slightly more angular.
description_view_2: The cone's stripes are more evenly spaced in this view, and the base looks less warped, with visible surface texture.
description_view_3: This view shows the most dirt and wear on the stripes, and the base appears to have a subtle texture and thickness.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Three white horizontal stripes spiral around the cone, each of moderate width, evenly spaced, and contrasting with the orange background. The stripes appear to be painted or printed on and are not highly reflective.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, square, and slightly warped, made of thicker rubber for stability. It is textured and appears to be weighted to prevent tipping.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The cone appears worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks, fading, and accumulated grime, indicating extensive outdoor use.
